questionHtml: Calculate the energy released, in kJ g−1, when 3.49 g of starch are completely combusted in a calorimeter, increasing the temperature of 975 g of water from 21.0 °C to 36.0 °C. Use section 1 of the data booklet.
markschemeHtml:
q = «mcΔT = 975 g × 4.18 J g–1 K–1 × 15.0 K =» 61 100 «J» / 61.1 «kJ»    [✔]

«heat per gram = 61.1  kJ 3.49  g =» 17.5 «kJ g–1»    [✔]

 

Note: Award [2] for correct final answer.
